text: I woke up late, but my productivity in the morning was relatively optimal. When Karen, my friend came to study/work with me, I started to feel hungry, so I went to get chipotle. Most of my day felt gone by 5 pm, because I was going to the gym, then going to get food, and playing volleyball, so I did not get alot of deep work done. Another thing I notice, because I use AI alot for my personal project, I get distracted and don't know what to do inbetween running. Maybe that is something targetable.
